bead.title: Stage 3.6: base layout + theme provider + nav shell
bead.description: Create src/routes/+layout.svelte with top nav placeholder (Node name), sidebar with placeholder links for each page (Beads, Documents, Graph, Workers, Sessions, Personas, Commits), dark-mode toggle, stub ProjectPicker. src/lib/theme.ts for theme provider. src/lib/components/NavShell.svelte + ProjectPicker.svelte (stubs). See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 3 bead #32.
bead.acceptance: (1) MANUAL: load / in `bun run dev`, see the shell layout with nav + sidebar + dark-mode toggle. (2) All 7 sidebar links present as placeholders. (3) Dark-mode toggle works.
